consensus_topology(3) Library Functions Manual consensus_topology(3)

NAME

consensus_topology - Ring topology for consensus participants.

SYNOPSIS

Data Fields


uint8_t participant_ids [64][16]
Participant UUIDs in sorted order. int num_participants
Total number of participants. int my_position
My index in the sorted list.

Detailed Description

Ring topology for consensus participants.

Maintains a sorted list of participant IDs for ring-based consensus algorithms and leader election.

Definition at line 17 of file topology.c.

Field Documentation

My index in the sorted list.
